mapper.select: SELECT ma, ma_loai_xe, tep, thu_tu FROM loai_xe_anh WHERE ma_loai_xe = #{maLoaiXe} ORDER BY thu_tu ASC, ma ASC
SELECT ma, ma_loai_xe, tep, thu_tu FROM loai_xe_anh WHERE ma = #{ma}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(thu_tu), -1) FROM loai_xe_anh WHERE ma_loai_xe = #{maLoaiXe}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loai_xe_anh (ma_loai_xe, tep, thu_tu) VALUES (#{maLoaiXe}, #{tep}, #{thuTu})
